    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "3, ['Suggestion to provide a buyer profile including personal, professional, or academic background to strengthen offers', 'Offer to prepare a buyer credibility dossier with supportive documentation such as degrees or certifications', 'Request for scanned copies or digital versions of client academic transcripts to include in offer package']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "10, ['Property listings with details such as price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, and features', 'Property condition attributes like renovated, move-in ready, energy-efficient', 'Neighborhood information such as proximity to parks and quiet cul-de-sac', 'Financing breakdown including down payment, mortgage principal, interest rate, amortization period, and term', 'Closing costs breakdown including legal fees, land transfer tax, title insurance, and property insurance', 'Service package for legal services with cost, provider, and package level', 'Service package for moving services including cost and service level', 'Utility setup service package with included services, cost, and provider', 'Total package summary with combined estimated total cost', 'Indication of competitive market conditions and general advice about seller preferences (interpretable as contextual information within property listing)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Suggestion to provide a buyer profile including personal, professional, or academic background to strengthen offers', 'Offer to prepare a buyer credibility dossier with supportive documentation such as degrees or certifications', 'Request for scanned copies or digital versions of client academic transcripts to include in offer package']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 10, ['Property listings with details such as price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, and features', 'Property condition attributes like renovated, move-in ready, energy-efficient', 'Neighborhood information such as proximity to parks and quiet cul-de-sac', 'Financing breakdown including down payment, mortgage principal, interest rate, amortization period, and term', 'Closing costs breakdown including legal fees, land transfer tax, title insurance, and property insurance', 'Service package for legal services with cost, provider, and package level', 'Service package for moving services including cost and service level', 'Utility setup service package with included services, cost, and provider', 'Total package summary with combined estimated total cost', 'Indication of competitive market conditions and general advice about seller preferences (interpretable as contextual information within property listing)']
